description: Uniswap V4 core contracts fork to Hardhat 3.

reset files & cache.command: git checkout -- test/libraries/BitMath.t.sol test/PoolManager.t.sol src/types/Currency.sol && npx hardhat clean

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/libraries/BitMath.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/PoolManager.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity contract: src/ty.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> src/types/Currency.sol && npx hardhat compile
